title: Copilot assistant for shareholder query summaries
problem: Service teams spend time reading long case notes and email threads before responding to shareholder or investor-service queries.
current_workflow: Analysts manually read historical notes, extract key facts, draft a response, and ask a senior colleague to check sensitive cases.
ai_approach: Use Microsoft Copilot or an approved internal GenAI assistant to summarise case history, identify missing information, and draft internal response notes for human review.
stakeholders: Customer service agents, team leaders, compliance, data protection, technology services
data_types: Customer service notes, email text, case metadata, internal knowledge articles

title: Corporate actions document obligation extractor
problem: Teams need to review long corporate-action or governance documents and identify dates, required actions, exceptions, and ownership.
current_workflow: Documents are manually read and converted into trackers, with quality depending on reviewer experience and time pressure.
ai_approach: Use a controlled document-analysis workflow to extract obligations, deadlines, risks, and open questions, then route the output to named human reviewers.
stakeholders: Operations, legal, governance, client-facing teams, risk, technology services
data_types: PDFs, Word documents, policy guidance, meeting notes, action trackers

title: Employee share plan FAQ knowledge assistant
problem: Employees and internal support teams may need faster answers to repeated share-plan questions while preserving accuracy and escalation for sensitive cases.
current_workflow: Users search FAQs, contact support, or wait for a specialist to interpret policy language.
ai_approach: Build a retrieval-based assistant over approved FAQ and policy content, with citations, confidence labels, and escalation when the question is ambiguous.
stakeholders: Employee share-plan support, HR clients, legal, compliance, customer operations, technology services
data_types: Approved FAQs, plan documents, policy pages, support transcripts after anonymisation

title: Internal AI adoption reporting assistant
problem: AI transformation teams need regular reporting on experiments, adoption, user feedback, blockers, and measurable impact.
current_workflow: Updates are gathered manually from project notes, spreadsheets, Teams messages, and workshop feedback.
ai_approach: Create a structured reporting workflow that summarises PoC progress, highlights blockers, generates stakeholder updates, and flags experiments needing leadership decisions.
stakeholders: AI Transformation Lead, Chief of Staff, project owners, business sponsors, L&D, communications
data_types: Project trackers, workshop feedback, adoption metrics, survey results, meeting notes
